External Employee Portal

Welcome to the external check-in portal

Use this page to start GPS check-in or check-out. Your records will still feed the existing OT calculation flow without changing the payment mechanism.

GPS Check-in
Open the GPS check-in page to record your attendance from the location where you are working.
Go to GPS Check-in
